strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems (millions of req/sec at Dunnhumby)
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus active knowledge-sharing via talks and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated director-level or principal-scope leadership; career history is senior/staff IC on delivery teams
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused, not the recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products the role demands
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners at an organizational level

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise gap
Depth and breadth of engineering experience (15+ years)

response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the tenure and technical-breadth bar, with strong craftsmanship, startup/founder experience, and emerging AI-agent infrastructure work. However, this is a director-level strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products, and the ability to advise executives and strategic partners — dimensions where the resume shows little evidence. He profiles as an excellent senior/staff engineer rather than a principal-level AI strategist, so fit for this specific role is marginal.
